title: Apple Mark Translucent Biomechanical Anatomical Organ AI
sourceTitle: Apple Mark Translucent Biomechanical Anatomical Organ AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic 3D anatomical human human heart crafted from semi-translucent frosted polycarbonate with minimal white Apple logo subtly embedded on the surface. Subject: human heart has a milky matte translucent shell, rounded injection-molded edges, precise manufacturing seams, subtle micro-texture, and interior micro gears, pistons, circuitry, and engineered chambers replacing organic tissue visible through the softened plastic blur. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: 1:1 square centered render with the anatomical organ as a premium translucent product object; minimal white Apple logo subtly embedded on the surface is subtly embedded on the surface, understated and not overpowering. Signature Elements: Preserved apple mark translucent biomechanical anatomical organ source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-detailed futuristic biomechanical render, realistic frosted polycarbonate material, industrial injection-molded product design, engineered organ concept, and premium Apple-like minimalist object photography. Color Palette: Milky translucent white, frosted polycarbonate grays, minimal white Apple logo, soft internal metallic components, pale circuitry tones, and pure white background. Lighting: Diffused studio lighting, realistic plastic light refraction, gentle shadow underneath, soft internal glow, and clean product-render highlight control. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
